_meta.notes: All slots and attributes verified directly from NPM package source. Do not re-derive for known components — use this registry.

header-utility.label: Global University Header
header-utility.notes: Fixed UMD global bar — identical on every page. Self-contained: renders UMD flag, 'A Top 20 Public Research University', and utility nav. No slots, no attrs needed. Hardcode in every template. Never touch during page updates.

header-site.label: Site Navigation Header

slots.name: logo
slots.description: Anchor tag wrapping a logo image or text. Short text (<30 chars) triggers large logo sizing automatically.

slots.name: main-navigation
slots.description: Container holding umd-element-nav-item children. Component extracts nav items automatically.

slots.name: utility-navigation
slots.description: Optional utility row shown above the nav row on desktop.

attrs.name: search-url
attrs.description: URL for search icon link

attrs.name: cta-url
attrs.description: CTA button URL — requires cta-text to activate

attrs.name: cta-text
attrs.description: CTA button label — requires cta-url to activate

attrs.name: sticky
attrs.description: Triggers sticky behavior when set to 'true'

variants.sticky: Add sticky attribute for fixed positioning on scroll

header-site.notes: Site-level header — logo and nav links change per site. The component auto-registers umd-element-nav-item children from the main-navigation slot. CTA button only appears when both cta-url and cta-text are present.

nav-item.label: Navigation Item

slots.name: primary-link
slots.description: The main anchor link for this nav item.

nav-item.notes: Used inside the main-navigation slot of umd-element-navigation-header. Each nav link = one umd-element-nav-item.

hero-standard.label: Hero

slots.name: headline
slots.description: Main heading. Use h1 for page-level heroes.

slots.name: actions
slots.description: CTA buttons. Wrap in a div for multiple actions.

attrs.name: data-display
attrs.description: Sets hero layout variant. Omit for standard default layout.

notes.overlay: Full-bleed background image with text overlay
notes.stacked: Image stacked above text (two-column on desktop)
notes.default-interior: Standard layout sized for interior pages

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Color theme. Omit for light default.

attrs.name: data-animation
attrs.description: Include attribute (no value) to enable entrance animations.

attrs.name: data-layout-height
attrs.description: Reduces hero height. Use for interior page heroes.

attrs.name: data-layout-text
attrs.description: Centers text alignment within the hero.

attrs.name: data-layout-space-horizontal
attrs.description: Expands horizontal spacing for wider text container.

variants.default: Standard hero — text left, image optional
variants.overlay: Full-bleed background image with text over it
variants.stacked: Image above, text below (two-column layout on desktop)
variants.stacked-interior: Shorter stacked variant for interior pages

hero-standard.notes: Most versatile hero. The README's example uses data-theme='dark' data-display='overlay' for a typical background image hero. For a dark overlay hero with a background image: add both data-theme='dark' and data-display='overlay' and slot an image.
hero-standard.example_dark_overlay:
Clark School of Engineering

Advancing the Future

World-class research and education.

Learn More

background hero.description: Same as standard hero. Image fills the background behind text. No data-display attribute.

background hero small centered.description: Full-bleed background image, reduced height, text centered

background hero small centered dark.description: Full-bleed background image, reduced height, text centered, dark theme

hero centered.description: Standard hero, text centered, no background image required

hero interior centered.description: Shorter hero for interior pages, text centered

stacked hero.description: Image above, text below (two-column on desktop)

stacked hero interior.description: Shorter stacked variant for interior pages

standard hero.description: Default hero — image renders as full background behind text. No data-display needed.

overlay hero.description: Distinct overlay variant. Image is composited with a color overlay. Uses data-display=overlay.

card-standard.label: Card
card-standard.description: General content card. Supports image, eyebrow, headline, text, date, and actions. Renders as a block (stacked) or list (horizontal) depending on data-display.

slots.name: headline
slots.description: Card title. Use an anchor tag to make the whole card clickable.

slots.name: image
slots.description: Card image. Use an anchor wrapping an img for linked images.

slots.name: date
slots.description: Publication or event date. Use a time element.

attrs.name: data-display
attrs.description: Layout variant. Omit for default block/stacked layout.

notes.list: Horizontal list layout — image right, text left
notes.promo: Dark overlay promo style with background image

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Color theme.

attrs.name: data-aligned
attrs.description: Force consistent aspect ratio on images across a group of cards.

card.description: Standard card with aligned image (consistent image height across grid)

card-standard.example:
Research

Article Title

Brief description of the article content.

March 1, 2025
card-standard.notes: Use data-aligned for card grids so all images crop to the same height.

card-overlay.label: Card Overlay
card-overlay.description: Card with text overlaid on a background image. Without an image, renders as a text-only dark card. Supports a custom CTA icon link.

slots.name: image
slots.description: Background image. Without this the card renders as a text-only variant.

slots.name: cta-icon
slots.description: Single anchor tag used as an icon CTA link.

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Color theme.

attrs.name: data-loading-priority
attrs.description: Image loading priority. Defaults to lazy.

overlay card.description: Card with image background and text overlay

card-overlay.example:
Research

Article Title

Brief description.

Learn More

card-icon.label: Card Icon
card-icon.description: Compact card designed for icon + headline + text combinations. Useful for feature lists, service grids, and program overviews.

slots.name: text
slots.example: Description of this feature or service.

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Dark color theme.

card-icon.example:
Research Excellence

Supporting description of this area.

card-video.label: Card Video
card-video.description: Video card that embeds a video element with play controls. Supports full or short height variants.

slots.name: video
slots.description: A video element. Required — component will log an error without it.

attrs.name: data-display
attrs.description: Shorter card height variant.

attrs.name: data-autoplay
attrs.description: Auto-play the video on load.

pathway.label: Pathway
pathway.description: Two-column promo section: image on one side, text content on the other. The most versatile promotional section component. Supports standard, hero, overlay, and sticky display modes.

slots.name: text
slots.description: Body copy. Wrap in a div for rich content.

slots.name: image
slots.description: Feature image. Required for most variants to render meaningfully.

slots.name: video
slots.description: Video element as alternative to image.

slots.name: stats
slots.description: Stat/data callouts displayed within the text area.

attrs.name: data-display
attrs.description: Layout variant. Omit for standard two-column layout.

notes.overlay: Text overlaid on image (similar to hero overlay)
notes.sticky: Sticky scroll layout — text sticks while image scrolls

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Color theme.

attrs.name: data-layout-image-position
attrs.description: Position the image on the left side. Default is right.

attrs.name: image-scaled
attrs.description: Scale/crop image to fill container. Defaults to true.

attrs.name: data-animation
attrs.description: Enable scroll-triggered entrance animation.

pathway maryland.description: Standard pathway, Maryland red theme — sets the text column background to solid red (#e21833) with white text. No other styling differences. Avoid for quote/feature content; prefer dark theme instead.

pathway image left.description: Standard pathway with image on left

pathway overlay.description: Overlay pathway — text on top of image

pathway.example:
Featured Research

Advancing the Future of Engineering

Our researchers are tackling the defining challenges of our time.

Explore Research

pathway-highlight.label: Pathway Highlight
pathway-highlight.description: Two-column pathway variant that pairs content text with a pull quote or highlighted statement on the right. No image — designed for quote-forward editorial sections.

slots.name: text
slots.description: Body copy on the left side.

slots.name: highlight
slots.description: Pull quote text displayed in the right column with a red accent bar.
slots.example: The work happening here will define the next generation of engineers.

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Dark color theme.

pathway-highlight.example:
From Our Dean

A Message of Excellence

Supporting body content on the left side of the section.

The work happening here will define the next generation of engineers.

— Dean John Smith

hero-minimal.label: Hero Minimal
hero-minimal.description: Compact, short-height hero. No background image required. Designed for interior pages, section headers, or anywhere a full-height hero would be too heavy. Supports dark, light, and maryland themes.

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Color theme. Omit for default (light).

hero-minimal.example:
The Graduate School

Graduate Admissions

Join one of the world's premier public research universities.

Apply Now
hero-minimal.notes: Best for interior pages and section intros. Host height is ~30vh. Use hero-standard for full-height landing heroes.

hero-expand.label: Hero Expand
hero-expand.description: Full-viewport sticky hero that reveals/expands as the user scrolls. Designed for immersive landing page experiences. Supports both a background image and a background video.

slots.name: image
slots.description: Background image. Used when no video is present.

slots.name: video
slots.description: Background video. Takes precedence over image when present.

attrs.name: data-layout-top-position
attrs.description: Pixel offset from top for sticky positioning (e.g. '60' to clear a sticky nav).

hero-expand.example:
University of Maryland

Fearless Ideas Start Here

Discover UMD
hero-expand.notes: Full 100vh height. Sticky scroll behavior is built in. Pair with data-layout-top-position if a sticky navigation header is present.

hero-logo.label: Hero Logo
hero-logo.description: Hero variant featuring a prominent image/logo lockup alongside headline and text. Designed for department or unit landing pages where the visual identity (logo or image) is front and center.

slots.name: image
slots.description: Logo or featured image displayed prominently in the layout.

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Color theme.

hero-logo.example:
Clark School of Engineering

Engineering the Future

World-class research and education in engineering and technology.

Learn More

hero-grid.label: Hero Grid
hero-grid.description: Full-viewport hero with a multi-image grid layout — two corner image columns flanking a center column that holds images and/or a video. The headline, text, and actions are overlaid or adjacent to the grid. Designed for visually immersive brand moments.

slots.name: column-left
slots.description: Left corner image column. Populate with img elements.

slots.name: column-right
slots.description: Right corner image column. Populate with img elements.

slots.name: column-center
slots.description: Center column. Accepts img elements and/or a single video element.

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Dark color theme.

hero-grid.example:
Fearless Ideas

World-class research at the University of Maryland.

Explore UMD
hero-grid.notes: Full 100vh height. All three column slots are required for layout to render correctly. Center column can include both images and a video.

hero-brand-video.label: Hero Brand Video
hero-brand-video.description: Full-viewport brand video hero. The video plays as a full-bleed background with headline and text overlaid. Supports an optional load-triggered entrance animation. No image fallback — video is required.

slots.name: video
slots.description: A video element placed as a direct child (not slotted with slot= attribute). Must be a plain <video> element.

slots.name: headline
slots.description: Main heading overlaid on the video.

slots.name: text
slots.description: Supporting body copy overlaid on the video.

attrs.name: animation-trigger
attrs.description: Set to 'load' to trigger entrance animation when the component loads.

brand video hero animated.description: Brand video hero with load animation

hero-brand-video.example:
Fearless Ideas Start Here

The University of Maryland — a Top 20 public research university.
hero-brand-video.notes: Video is a direct child element, NOT slotted with slot= attribute. Headline and text use slot= as normal. Full 100vh height.

section-intro.label: Section Intro
section-intro.description: Centered section header block with headline, optional body text, and optional actions. Displays at a constrained max-width with center-aligned text. Supports a decorative red vertical line above the headline via the include-separator attribute. Use to introduce a content section on landing pages.

slots.name: headline
slots.description: Section heading. Renders uppercase, bold, large sans-serif.

slots.name: text
slots.description: Body copy paragraph(s) displayed below the headline.

slots.name: actions
slots.description: CTA button(s) displayed below the text.

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Dark theme — white text on dark backgrounds.

attrs.name: include-separator
attrs.description: Adds a decorative red vertical line above the headline (adds top padding). Boolean attribute — presence enables it.

section intro separator.description: Centered section header with red separator line above

section-intro.notes: Text aligns center. Max-width constrains content to roughly 640px. When no headline is provided, text renders larger. If only text (no headline), text gets largest/bold treatment.
section-intro.example:
Our Research Areas

Discover the cutting-edge work happening across our departments.

Explore Research

section-intro-wide.label: Section Intro Wide
section-intro-wide.description: Full-width section header with headline on the left and an optional CTA on the right. At desktop (500px+ container), headline and actions display as a flex row. Use to label a content grid or list with a prominent 'View All' link.

slots.name: headline
slots.description: Section heading. Renders uppercase, bold, large sans-serif.

slots.name: actions
slots.description: CTA link or button displayed to the right of the headline at desktop.

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Dark theme — white text on dark backgrounds.

section intro wide.description: Wide section header, headline left, CTA right

section-intro-wide.notes: No text slot — wide variant is headline + optional CTA only. Layout switches to flex row at container width 500px+. Uses container-type: inline-size on host (same pattern as pathway).
section-intro-wide.example:
Featured Stories

View All News

footer.label: Footer
footer.description: University-branded site footer. Three display variants: simple (default), mega (three nav columns), and visual (image background). Automatically sets role='contentinfo' and aria-label='site footer'. The global utility header (umd-element-utility-header) is always at the top of the page; this footer closes the page.

slots.name: logo
slots.description: Department/unit logo. Must be an element with an inside.

slots.name: contact-links
slots.description: Contact links (email, phone) as a list or inline links.

slots.name: social-links
slots.description: Social media links. Use a <ul> of <li><a> items.

slots.name: utility-links
slots.description: Utility/legal nav links (Privacy Policy, Web Accessibility, etc). Use a <ul>.

slots.name: actions
slots.description: Primary CTA button displayed prominently in the footer.

slots.name: link-column-one
slots.description: First nav column. Mega footer only. Use a <nav> with a <ul> of links.

slots.name: link-column-two
slots.description: Second nav column. Mega footer only.

slots.name: link-column-three
slots.description: Third nav column. Mega footer only.

attrs.name: data-display
attrs.description: Footer variant. Omit or use 'simple' for default. 'mega' enables three nav columns. 'visual' uses a background image.

notes.simple: Default single-column footer with contact info and social links
notes.mega: Full footer with up to three nav link columns, contact, and social
notes.visual: Image-backed footer — set slot='image' for background

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Light theme — dark text on light gray background instead of dark footer.

footer mega.description: Mega footer with three nav columns

footer light.description: Footer with light theme (dark text on light background)

footer.notes: role='contentinfo' and aria-label='site footer' are auto-applied if absent. Logo slot must be an wrapping an . Link columns only render if they have child nodes. Simple is default if neither mega nor visual is set.
footer.example:
College of Engineering

1101 Engineering Building
College Park, MD 20742
eng@umd.edu (301) 405-1000
  • Twitter
  • Facebook
  • Privacy Policy
  • Web Accessibility
